title: GaebongAllStar
description:
Find Out Who the Ultimate Star of Gaebong Is!Gaebong All Star is an online brawler for 2 to 10 players. Choose from a cast of unique characters and jump into chaotic battles with your friends on unpredictable battlegrounds.

Unique Characters, Each Fighting in Their Own WayPlay as Leproxy, who fights with powerful punches and help from his cat Momo; LYS, who uses firearms and support troops; Kung, who disrupts the battlefield with bouncy jelly; Harper, who switches between three different guitars; or Samuel, who supports allies alongside an angel.

Each character has their own basic attack, passive ability, and special skills. Find the character that suits you, master their skill combinations, and turn the tide of battle.

Survive Alone or Win as a TeamFree-for-All — The only person you can trust is yourself. Take down every opponent and survive until the very end.

Team Battle — Make use of your allies' abilities, combine your skills, and defeat the opposing team.

Unpredictable BattlegroundsOrdinary apartments and schools quickly turn into complete chaos. Take the best positions and knock your opponents into dangerous spots.

Items that appear on the battlefield can also change the outcome of a match. Recover health with hamburgers, launch enemies away with mines, or ambush them by swapping positions. You can even become faster or temporarily invincible, turning desperate moments into opportunities.

Key Features• Online multiplayer for 2 to 10 players

• Free-for-All and Team Battle game modes

• 5 characters with different combat styles

• A variety of skills and items that can turn the battle around

• Distinct battlegrounds set in apartments and schools

• Supports Korean, English, and Japanese

Gather your friends and prove who the ultimate star of Gaebong really is!
description_short: An online brawler where up to 10 players fight together! Choose a unique character, make use of items and terrain, and become the last one standing.
